page_metadata.biotools__summary: TElocal is a tool that utilizes both uniquely and ambiguously mapped reads to quantify transposable element expression at the locus level. TElocal takes RNA-seq (and similar data) and annotates reads to both genes & transposable elements.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: TElocal is a tool that utilizes both uniquely and ambiguously mapped reads to quantify transposable element expression at the locus level. TElocal takes RNA-seq (and similar data) and annotates reads to both genes & transposable elements.
